body:
This PR implements very simple momentum equations that step _with_ the tracers using the same timestepper as the tracers.

Everything is treated explicitly, there is no implementation of the free surface term and the rheology implemented here is a simple viscous rheology with a viscosity.

EDIT:
This is the final output of the `ice_advected_by_anticyclone.jl` file

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5058c1ad-7982-41c6-b682-20869bfaa82a
title: Explicit momentum equations
